name: 4pc (Set of 2) Plastic Rectangular Food Storage Container Set Blue - Figmint™
description:
The 4-Piece (Set of 2) 3-Cup Plastic Rectangular Food Storage Container Set from Figmint™ is the perfect solution for storing leftovers, cut fruits and veggies, hard-boiled eggs and more. Made from plastic, this set comes with two rectangular food storage containers, each with a three-cup capacity, plus two solid blue lids. The containers are dishwasher and freezer safe for easy cleaning and storage, and they're also microwave safe for reheating without the lids.

Figmint™: Mixing up a taste of adventure every day.
